description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:alpine Docker image and runs a before_script installing MkDocs with pip. Define a single job named pages (running in the default stage) that executes the shell commands "mkdocs build" followed by "mv site public". Configure the job to publish the resulting public/ directory as an artifact and restrict its execution to the master branch only. This job should deploy the built site to GitLab Pages.
